free_text: The 9Be(d,t)8Be and 9Be(d,alpha)7Li reaction in the
energy range from 12.17 MeV to 14.43 MeV
A self-supporting 9Be foil was prepared from metallic
Be by an evaporation chamber. The thickness of the foil
was  109+-13 mu-g/cm**2
A counter telescope consisting of a
50 mu-m SSD transmission type followed by a 1000 mu-m
SSD was used for triton detection, and a 200 mu-m SSD
(in the forward angular range) and a 50 mu-m SSD (in
the backward) were used for alpha particle detection
* A monitor counter of a 2000 mu-m SSD was set at 30
degr respect to the beam direction, and elastic
deuterons were monitored with a 400-channel PHA.
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
The accuracy of data presentation  has been revised.
The errors in the absolute cross
sections. No information about source of uncertainty
fig 2 from J.Phys.Soc.Japan,44(1978)1405
